title: SPOCK BROW!？ 🥴 Here’s what happens when you inject Botox heavily in one area but not the others
filename: SPOCK BROW!？ 🥴 Here’s what happens when you inject Botox heavily in one area but not the others.en.vtt
excerpt: Let me tell you about the botox that I recently got like 10 days ago fast forward to the 10 days where it's nearly fully kicked in oh she's spocking all right I can smell what The Rock is cooking I look like the kid from Maze Runner I would have been nice if all patients could se…

segments.text: let me tell you about the botox that I recently got like 10 days ago fast forward to the 10 days where it's nearly fully kicked in oh she's spocking all right I can smell what The Rock is cooking I look like the kid from Maze Runner I would have been nice if all patients could see the funny side um she this patient has particularly strong frontalis muscle she's been treated heavily in the middle and not treated very strongly anywhere else so there's tons of activity all the way over here nothing in the middle and that's what's causing that s shape so a medial brow depression a lateral brow lift it is basically a spot brow but easy to fix I'd be confident I'd be able to get a good result with her she just needs more along the top and a couple little bit here and there but the bit I couldn't change is how much has been put in the middle because that's why she's got the medial heaviness so less here and more everywhere else and it probably would have been a better result you'd get there eventually with her she seems like a fun patient I'm sure she'd be fine as long as you talk her through it
